title: Numbers With Same Consecutive Differences
hints: Consider building numbers digit by digit from left to right. For each position, the next digit is determined by the previous one and k.
Use recursion or a queue to explore valid paths. At each step, try adding k and subtracting k from the current last digit, checking bounds.
Start with digits 1-9 for the first position. Recurse until length n is reached, ensuring new digits are between 0 and 9.
